'''lanutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wulignan|wulignan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wulignan|wulignan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lanutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lænitith|lænitith]] || [[word:lænitij|lænitij]] || [[word:lænitish|lænitish]] || [[word:læniti|læniti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lanunututh|lanunututh]] || [[word:lanunutuj|lanunutuj]] || [[word:lanunutush|lanunutush]] || [[word:lanunutu|lanunutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lanututh|lanututh]] || [[word:lanutuj|lanutuj]] || [[word:lanutush|lanutush]] || [[word:lanutu|lanutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lanuftuth|lanuftuth]] || [[word:lanuftuj|lanuftuj]] || [[word:lanuftush|lanuftush]] || [[word:lanuftuf|lanuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lanututhu|lanututhu]] || [[word:lanutuju|lanutuju]] || [[word:lanutushu|lanutushu]] || [[word:lanutuku|lanutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lanututh|lanututh]] || [[word:lanutuj|lanutuj]] || [[word:lanutush|lanutush]] || [[word:lanutu|lanutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lanututhul|lanututhul]] || [[word:lanutujul|lanutujul]] || [[word:lanutushul|lanutushul]] || [[word:lanutukul|lanutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lanututhuthu|lanututhuthu]] || [[word:lanutujuju|lanutujuju]] || [[word:lanutushushu|lanutushushu]] || [[word:lanutuku|lanutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lanututhun|lanututhun]] || [[word:lanutujun|lanutujun]] || [[word:lanutushun|lanutushun]] || [[word:lanutukun|lanutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lanututhuoro|lanututhuoro]] || [[word:lanutujuoro|lanutujuoro]] || [[word:lanutushuoro|lanutushuoro]] || [[word:lanutukuoro|lanutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
